title: Flights & Flatbread with Kosta Browne
description:
🗓️ April 21st

🕕 4 - 8 PM

🍷 Kosta Browne

📍Whispering Vine Fourth St.

💵 $45 per person


Flatbread:

Mushroom, leeks, fennel fontina sausage flatbread.


Price includes a flatbread and a tasting of Kosta Browne Wines. If you buy a bottle, the tasting fee will be waived
